use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms, modals, and call-to-action sections across web applications
Destructive variant for delete, cancel, or dangerous action confirmation flows
Outline style for secondary actions in multi-step workflows and settings panels
Ghost variant for minimal UI designs with inline contextual button actions
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars, navigation controls, and mobile interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features shadow effects, hover states, and accessibility focus rings for production-ready web applications.
